title: Plant-Disease-Detection-CV
description: Benchmarking Foundation Models (ViT, DINOv2) vs CNNs on 163K+ images for plant disease segmentation. Includes Transfer Learning, Grad-CAM explainability, and DeepLabV3+ achieving Dice 0.8612.
summary: 该内容对比了基础模型（ViT、DINOv2）与CNN在超过16.3万张图像上的植物病害分割任务表现，涉及迁移学习、Grad-CAM可解释性分析，并采用DeepLabV3+模型达到了0.8612的Dice系数。
